app.title: Sonar
home.blurb: Two submarines. One ocean. Neither can see the other. In the darkness, sonar finds the target. Beneath the waves, the one who strikes with precision survives.
home.joinHint: Scan host QR or open their link
home.camError: ⚠️ Cannot open camera — check permission & HTTPS
connect.showQr: Let your opponent scan this QR
error.badCode: Invalid or unreadable code. Double-check it and try again.
error.wrongRole: Wrong code type — make sure you're scanning the other player's code, not your own.
notice.title: Can't connect
notice.handshakeFailed: Failed to establish the connection. Try again, or create a new room.
notice.timeout: Timed out — the other player didn't connect. Same WiFi is most reliable; across networks a NAT may be blocking it.
notice.connLost: Lost connection to the other player.
place.hint: Tap a water cell to launch your sub.
play.torpedoHint: Tap a target cell in range
ro.name: RADIO OPERATOR
ro.tapPin: Tap a possible cell to pin a position hypothesis.
ro.tapFan: Enemy ran silent! Tap a cell to choose where they slipped.
ro.empty: No enemy moves yet. The plot builds as the enemy moves, surfaces, or is pinged.
reveal.title: SONAR PING!
reveal.prompt: Enemy pinged you. You must reveal one TRUE line — choose the one that gives away the least:
silence.hint: Slip up to 3 cells in one direction — they won't know where.
resign.confirm: Abandon this match? Your opponent wins.
end.winSub: You hunted them down and ended it on the seabed.
end.loseSub: They pinned your position and breached the hull.
